title: Come Work With Us—As Our New Associate Editor!
gist: A routine Lawfare associate-editor job posting; minimal investor signal beyond confirming the outlet's continued editorial staffing and compensation levels.

insights.claim: Lawfare is hiring an entry-level associate editor at a competitive salary range of $48,800-$60,000, with fully-paid health/dental premiums and a 401(k) match up to 4 percent.
insights.speaker: Tyler McBrien
insights.so_what: Sets a reference point for nonprofit national-security media compensation and confirms ongoing editorial expansion.
insights.locator: We are pleased to announce that we are now accepting

insights.claim: The associate editor role spans editorial review, podcast development, long-term research projects, website management, and fundraising/donor documentation, indicating Lawfare runs lean with cross-functional generalist staff.
insights.speaker: Tyler McBrien
insights.so_what: Reflects the resource-constrained, generalist operating model of a nonprofit media organization.
insights.locator: The associate editor works at the direction
